name: Swish Indoor Golf
about: Swish Indoor Golf provides a premier indoor golfing experience in Waterville, Maine. The venue features two custom indoor golf simulators designed to offer an exceptional and innovative golfing experience year-round. Custom simulator units are utilized to avoid the software and component constraints found in other turnkey solutions. With a focus on flexibility, the facility operates on varied schedules to accommodate different needs. The venue offers a full-service bar and curated food and beverage options to enhance the golfing experience, making it suitable for both casual play and more serious practice sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Custom-built simulator hardware not limited by common turnkey constraints
Flexible operating hours to fit any schedule
Full-service bar and curated food offerings available on-site
Innovative technology providing a premium indoor golf experience

food_and_drink.notes: Curated food offerings available to fuel your game
Full-service bar with drinks available between rounds

simulator_hardware.notes: Custom-built simulators not constrained by typical turnkey software and component limitations

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to call them directly at 207-616-3737 to inquire about club availability and rentals.

faq.answer: Swish Indoor Golf offers a full-service bar and curated food and beverage options on-site. The website does not mention a policy on outside food or drink, so it's best to confirm with the venue directly.

faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play a full 18 holes. Contact Swish Indoor Golf at 207-616-3737 for more details on playing times.

faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state if the venue is kid-friendly or offers specific amenities for children. It is advisable to contact the venue directly for information regarding family and junior policies.
